name: buffer
title: Buffer
description: Manage Buffer posts, schedule content, and view analytics directly from Raycast.
author: carlosperez

commands.name: scheduled-posts
commands.title: Scheduled Posts
commands.subtitle: Buffer
commands.description: View and manage your scheduled Buffer posts

commands.name: sent-posts
commands.title: Sent Posts
commands.subtitle: Buffer
commands.description: View sent posts and engagement metrics

commands.name: create-post
commands.title: Create Post
commands.subtitle: Buffer
commands.description: Create a new post and add it to your Buffer queue

commands.name: draft-posts
commands.title: Draft Posts
commands.subtitle: Buffer
commands.description: View and manage Buffer drafts and pending approvals

commands.name: create-idea
commands.title: Create Idea
commands.subtitle: Buffer
commands.description: Create a new idea in Buffer

commands.name: account-overview
commands.title: Account Overview
commands.subtitle: Buffer
commands.description: Inspect your Buffer account, organizations, and connected apps

commands.name: organizations
commands.title: Organizations
commands.subtitle: Buffer
commands.description: View your Buffer organizations and limits

tools.name: get-account
tools.title: Get Account
tools.description: Get the authenticated Buffer account with organizations and connected apps

tools.name: list-organizations
tools.title: List Organizations
tools.description: List the Buffer organizations available in the current account

tools.name: list-channels
tools.title: List Channels
tools.description: List the active Buffer channels available in the current account

tools.name: get-channel
tools.title: Get Channel
tools.description: Get details for a single Buffer channel

tools.name: list-posts
tools.title: List Posts
tools.description: List Buffer posts with optional status, channel, and date filtering

tools.name: list-scheduled-posts
tools.title: List Scheduled Posts
tools.description: List upcoming scheduled Buffer posts, optionally filtered by channel

tools.name: delete-post
tools.title: Delete Post
tools.description: Delete a Buffer post by its exact post ID

tools.name: create-post
tools.title: Create Post
tools.description: Create a new Buffer post for a specific channel, either queued automatically, scheduled, or saved as a draft. Supports text, image URLs, and video URLs.

tools.name: create-idea
tools.title: Create Idea
tools.description: Create a new idea in the current Buffer organization

ai.instructions: Use this extension to work with the user's Buffer account. If the user wants to post to a specific channel and the channel is unclear, call the channel listing tool first. Prefer active channels. When creating a post, keep the provided text exactly unless the user explicitly asks to rewrite it. If the user asks for upcoming content, use the scheduled posts or generic posts tool. Do not create posts for multiple channels unless the user explicitly asks for multiple channels, all channels, or cross-posting. If the user gives one post without naming multiple channels, ask for or choose a single channel only. Use draft mode when the user asks to save without publishing. Use the idea tool when the user asks to capture content ideas rather than schedule a post. Use the account and organization tools for workspace/account questions.

preferences.name: accessToken
preferences.title: Buffer Access Token
preferences.description: Your Buffer API access token. Get it at publish.buffer.com/settings/api
